text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Uuugh, that's it. I'm all tapped out. Flower, wake
me up in half an hour.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Ah, okay! Leave it to me. I'll set an alarm so I
don't forget.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...Flower, don't you think you're being a bit too
nice?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: "What, you're going to nap now?!" or "Wake yourself up!" are the type of responses I usually get.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Why would I do that? You wouldn't be
napping if you weren't tired, right?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Don't you worry! I'll keep track of the time, so
you get lots of rest and recover your energy!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hnnngh... Flower used Conscience Attack. Sei is
racked with guilt!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Change of plans. You and I are gonna take a nap
together, Flower. I'll set an alarm and wake us up.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You sure are. Getting lots of sleep is vital for
growing children, so... Get lots of z's and grow up
fast.
